title: erysimum lyratum
intro: Erysimum lyratum, also known as the lyre flower, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its fragrant, white or purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. Erysimum lyratum is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and sometimes dried or preserved for later use in various herbal preparations.
